repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dynamic_iv_compliance_v1: full-history finite LP necessity for dynamic partial-ID response types

published_prior_art.cite: Manski1990: bounded-treatment-effect partial identification by optimizing over compatible latent structures
AtheyChettyImbensKang2019: surrogate-index ATE equals long-term ATE under Prentice surrogacy and comparability

repo_prior_art.cite: none; q1_partial_did_unobserved_trends concerns aggregate DID pretrend summaries, and pid_dynamic_iv_compliance concerns dynamic IV compliance maps

published_prior_art.cite: FanManzanaresParkQi2026: unknown-copula WSI identified sets; HuangWangYuanZhaoZhang2026: longitudinal surrogate point extrapolation, neither states noisy-panel drift tightening
ChenGengJia2007: surrogate paradox sign warning; BibautKallusEjdemyrZhao2023: many weak experiments/proxies for imperfect surrogates, not a one-panel sharp drift boundary

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Finite LP sharpness is generic Manski-family finite partial-ID algebra, not a new published-axis theorem.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The zero-drift exact-surrogate collapse is the Athey-Chetty-Imbens-Kang surrogate-index identification corner.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / Assumption 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The measurement assumption uses latent states U_j(d) for j<J, but the setup only defines U_J(d) and U_H(d).

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: mu_SI applies m to noisy observed S_J even though m is defined on latent U_H, and the scalar absolute radius needs symmetry or one-sided residual radii for the stated iff sign rule.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define a full latent path U_j(d) or explicitly state that every S_j is a noisy measurement of the same terminal U_J(d); then rewrite the response-type set and Assumption 3 accordingly.
Replace the sign boundary with asymmetric residual endpoints r_-(P), r_+(P), or add a symmetry condition under which the max-absolute residual radius is necessary as well as sufficient.
Demote Theorems 1 and 2 to setup/sanity propositions or explicitly mark them non-novel in the theorem ledger so the novelty claim rests only on the two conjectures.
Add a short comparison to proximal/noisy-proxy surrogate-index work under unobserved confounding and state why proxy identification is orthogonal to bounded post-surrogate drift partial ID.

recommended_next_step: Revise the latent-state indexing and Conjecture 2 boundary, then rerun the novelty review before Stage 0.
